creator: tanimura@sakuramail.com
text:
Updated x11-toolkit/iv. I worked on the following things:

1 Imported the works for elf on japanese/iv by Yoshiro MIHIRA with a few change. This port now makes under elf as well as aout.
2 Reorganized the patches. Now every patch applies to only one file(whew!).
3 Wrote pkg/INSTALL and pkg/DEINSTALL so that the package installs the elf share objects correctly.
4 Fixed Makefile.
5 I will maintain this port.

Fix: Please apply this patch(gzipped + uuencoded).
